description: Five stacks in a ring with loads [1,7,3,9,5]. Minimise load range and solution length.

reference_front.notes: Fully balanced (all stacks = 5). Minimum 4 adjacent shifts needed: Stack4→Stack3(2), Stack4→Stack5(2), Stack5→Stack1(2), Stack2→Stack1(2).
Example: after 3 shifts achieving loads [3,5,5,7,5] or similar near-balanced distribution.
Example: after 2 shifts, e.g. Stack4→Stack3(2) and Stack2→Stack1(2) → [3,5,5,7,5].
Best single shift: move 2 from Stack4 to Stack3 → [1,7,5,7,5], LoadRange=6.

validation.pass_condition: Algorithm-found front must not be dominated by the reference_front (epsilon-dominance ≤ 1 load unit)

notes: Reference front points are non-dominated upper bounds derived by hand for the 5-stack ring topology. Stochastic runs may find equally good or better points.
